title: pageel/para-workspace
summary: PARA Workspace是一个开源的工作空间框架，它定义了人类和AI代理如何组织知识和协作完成项目。该框架包含内核（宪法）、命令行工具和模板，用于生成实际工作的工作空间，支持AI代理和人类协作，适用于开发工具和流程管理。，基于模型推理的架构
description: 🌌 PARA Workspace is an open-source workspace framework that defines how humans and AI agents organize knowledge and collaborate on projects. It ships as a repo containing a kernel (constitution), CLI tools, and templates — which generates workspaces where you actually work.
